items.titolo: OpenAI Acquires Tech Talk Show ‘TBPN’—and Buys Itself Some Positive News
items.descrizione: OpenAI is acquiring TBPN, a business talk show that’s popular among Silicon Valley elites, as it continues to battle its negative public image.

items.titolo: How to switch from ChatGPT to Gemini - without starting from scratch
items.descrizione: Gemini will now let you transfer your memories, chat history, and preferences from another AI so you don't have to start over. Here's how it works.

items.titolo: Cursor Launches a New AI Agent Experience to Take On Claude Code and Codex
items.descrizione: As Cursor launches the next generation of its product, the AI coding startup has to compete with OpenAI and Anthropic more directly than ever.
